dimensions.label: Value
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: All slots and banks are empty - nothing to adjust.
what_to_strengthen: Fill the transformation statement first - everything else ladders from it
Define the 5-step method with named steps, not just labels
Add at least one teaching framework with WHY/WHAT/HOW structure

dimensions.label: Authority
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: All slots and banks are empty - nothing to adjust.
what_to_strengthen: Add own_proof_intro with a single sentence framing your credibility
Add 3-5 wins with dollar amounts, dates, or specific outcomes
Add proof points that connect wins to the transformation you deliver

dimensions.label: Point of View
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: The single POV bank entry is an explicit template placeholder, not real content - deducting relevance.
what_to_strengthen: Replace the example POV with a real belief flip: name the common belief, your counter-belief, and why
Fill the common_enemy slot - what broken advice or system are you against
Write 3 POV flips that would make someone in your industry uncomfortable

dimensions.label: Connection
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: All slots and banks are empty - nothing to adjust.
what_to_strengthen: Write my_story_text first - the full origin story with sensory detail
Add 5-10 micro-stories with specific moments, places, and emotions
Fill compressed_story as the 2-sentence version of the origin story
